command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "cat > /tmp/setup_telegram.sh << 'SHEOF'
#!/bin/bash

# Add Telegram config to Hermes .env
cat >> /home/jose/.hermes/.env << 'ENVEOF'

# Telegram - Sakura-chan
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=8849049212:AAG4BfaeqinpzPxN-EKmtsMTFZeUc01nua0
TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USERS=8869156588
ENVEOF
echo env_updated

# Check current gateway config for telegram section
grep -A5 telegram /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml | head -20
SHEOF
bash /tmp/setup_telegram.sh"
